iterations.theme: Utjecaj umjetne inteligencije na katoličku evangelizaciju: Prilike, izazovi deepfakea i uloga Crkve u podršci digitalnim misionarima

sections.subtitle: Dvostruka priroda AI u katoličkom sadržaju: Prilike i rizici deepfakea
sections.screenshot_description: Jose Diorikidi objašnjava složenost AI u katoličkoj evangelizaciji, s naglaskom na deepfakeove.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi u uvodu ističe dvostruku prirodu umjetne inteligencije (AI) u kontekstu katoličkog sadržaja. S jedne strane, AI može značajno olakšati rad digitalnim misionarima i katoličkim kreatorima, nudeći alate za bržu i učinkovitiju produkciju sadržaja. S druge strane, postoji značajan rizik od masovne proizvodnje sadržaja niske kvalitete, neatraktivnog ili čak obmanjujućeg. Posebno zabrinjavaju deepfakeovi, koji mogu prikazivati vjerske figure, poput Pape, kako govore stvari koje nisu istinite ili su izvan konteksta. Iako takvi deepfakeovi ponekad mogu pozivati na dobre stvari ili sakramente, Diorikidi naglašava potrebu za oprezom i jasnim razgraničenjem, jer, kako kaže, 'to nije papa'.
sections.subtitle_en: The dual nature of AI in Catholic content: Opportunities and risks of deepfake
sections.screenshot_description_en: Jose Diorikidi explains the complexity of AI in Catholic evangelization, with an emphasis on deepfakes.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi in the introduction emphasizes the double nature of artificial intelligence (AI) in the context of Catholic content. On one hand, AI can significantly facilitate the work for digital missionaries and Catholic creators, offering tools for faster and more efficient content production. On the other hand, there is a significant risk of mass production of low-quality, unattractive, or even misleading content. Deepfakes are particularly concerning, which can depict religious figures, like the Pope, speaking things that are not true or are out of context. Although such deepfakes can sometimes call for good things or sacraments, Diorikidi emphasizes the need for caution and clear demarcation, because, as he says, 'that is not the pope'.

sections.subtitle: AI kao alat za kreatore naspram dezinformacija putem deepfakea
sections.screenshot_description: Jose Diorikidi objašnjava kako AI može pomoći kreatorima, ali i stvoriti dezinformacije.
sections.content: Voditelj pozdravlja Josea Diorikidija, ističući njegovo poznavanje mreže Juan Diego i utjecajnih osoba na društvenim mrežama. Postavlja ključno pitanje o prilikama i izazovima koje umjetna inteligencija donosi u evangelizaciji. Jose Diorikidi objašnjava kako AI može pomoći katoličkim kreatorima u istraživanju i provjeri izvora, navodeći Magisterium AI kao primjer. Međutim, upozorava na nedostatke, poput toga da ChatGPT još uvijek može pogrešno identificirati Papu Franju. Glavni izazov ostaju deepfakeovi, koji, iako ponekad s dobrim namjerama, mogu širiti netočne informacije, čak i ako je poruka pravovjerna, jer izvor nije autentičan.
sections.subtitle_en: AI as a tool for creators versus disinformation via deepfakes
sections.screenshot_description_en: Jose Diorikidi explains how AI can help creators, but also create disinformation.
sections.content_en: The host welcomes Jose Diorikidi, highlighting his knowledge of the Juan Diego network and influencers on social networks. He poses a key question about the opportunities and challenges that artificial intelligence brings to evangelization. Jose Diorikidi explains how AI can help Catholic creators in research and source verification, citing Magisterium AI as an example. However, he warns of shortcomings, such as that ChatGPT can still incorrectly identify Pope Francis. The main challenge remains deepfakes, which, although sometimes with good intentions, can spread inaccurate information, even if the message is orthodox, because the source is not authentic.

sections.subtitle: Poteškoće u razlučivanju istine za prosječnog vjernika
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj i Jose raspravljaju o izazovima prepoznavanja deepfakea za prosječnog vjernika.
sections.content: Voditelj izražava zabrinutost zbog sve veće sofisticiranosti AI tehnologije, što otežava prosječnom vjerniku razlučivanje istinitog od lažnog sadržaja. Prisjeća se primjera 'Gucci Pape', deepfakea koji je bio očito lažan, ali upozorava da će budući videozapisi i fotografije biti mnogo uvjerljiviji. Jose Diorikidi naglašava da je ključno 'ići do izvora', što je, priznaje, izuzetno teško u današnjem preplavljenom informacijskom okruženju. Ističe da je potrebna snažna formacija vjernika kako bi razvili sposobnost razlučivanja, jer su, prema njegovom mišljenju, katolici često 'loše formirani' u tom pogledu. Upozorava da je lako pasti u zamku deepfake videa koji prenose 'dobre stvari', ali nisu autentični.
sections.subtitle_en: Difficulties in discerning the truth for the average believer
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host and Jose discuss the challenges of recognizing deepfakes for the average believer.
sections.content_en: The host expresses concern about the increasing sophistication of AI technology, which makes it difficult for the average believer to discern true from false content. He recalls the example of the 'Gucci Pope', a deepfake that was obviously false, but warns that future videos and photos will be much more convincing. Jose Diorikidi emphasizes that it is crucial 'to go to the source', which, he admits, is extremely difficult in today's overwhelmed information environment. He points out that a strong formation of believers is needed in order to develop the ability of discernment, because, in his opinion, Catholics are often 'poorly formed' in that regard. He warns that it is easy to fall into the trap of deepfake videos that convey 'good things', but are not authentic.

sections.subtitle: Pozitivni potencijal AI: Kloniranje glasa za globalnu evangelizaciju
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava kako kloniranje glasa može pomoći u širenju Evanđelja na različitim jezicima.
sections.content: Matthew ističe značajne prilike koje AI nudi za evangelizaciju. Kao jedan od najuzbudljivijih aspekata navodi mogućnost kloniranja glasa i sinkronizacije usana. Objašnjava kako se podcast snimljen na engleskom jeziku može prevesti na kineski, pri čemu AI mijenja pokrete usana govornika kako bi izgledalo kao da govori kineski. Ova tehnologija omogućuje dosezanje ljudi diljem svijeta na njihovom materinjem jeziku, što Matthew smatra 'nevjerojatnim otključavanjem' za širenje Evanđelja. Naglašava da, kada se koristi s dobrim namjerama i u službi misije, AI može biti iznimno koristan alat.
sections.subtitle_en: Positive potential of AI: Voice cloning for global evangelization
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains how voice cloning can help in spreading the Gospel in different languages.
sections.content_en: Matthew highlights significant opportunities that AI offers for evangelization. As one of the most exciting aspects, he cites the possibility of voice cloning and lip-syncing. He explains how a podcast recorded in the English language can be translated into Chinese, whereby AI changes the lip movements of the speaker so that it looks as if they are speaking Chinese. This technology enables reaching people throughout the world in their native language, which Matthew considers an 'incredible unlocking' for the spreading of the Gospel. He emphasizes that, when used with good intentions and in the service of the mission, AI can be an extremely useful tool.

sections.subtitle: Potreba za snažnom formacijom protiv deepfakea i odgovornost platformi
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o potrebi za formacijom i odgovornosti platformi u borbi protiv deepfakea.
sections.content: Matthew se slaže s Joseom oko ključne uloge snažne formacije u ublažavanju rizika od deepfakea. Upozorava da čak i deepfake videozapisi Pape, stvoreni s dobrim namjerama, ali s doktrinarno upitnim sadržajem, mogu izazvati masovne probleme. Osim formacije, Matthew naglašava odgovornost platformi. Smatra da bi Crkva trebala lobirati kod platformi da razviju sposobnost detekcije deepfake sadržaja i da ga jasno označe. Predlaže univerzalni standard vodenog žiga na svakom kadru videozapisa, slično praksi Hey Gena, kako bi se jasno naznačilo da je sadržaj generiran umjetnom inteligencijom. Jose spominje kanal 'Glas pape' koji u opisu navodi da je sadržaj AI generiran, no Matthew smatra da to nije dovoljno i da je potreban vidljiviji vodeni žig.
sections.subtitle_en: The need for strong formation against deepfakes and the responsibility of platforms
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the need for formation and the responsibility of platforms in the fight against deepfake.
sections.content_en: Matthew agrees with Jose about the key role of strong formation in mitigating the risks of deepfakes. He warns that even deepfake videos of the Pope, created with good intentions but with doctrinally questionable content, can cause massive problems. Besides formation, Matthew emphasizes the responsibility of platforms. He considers that the Church should lobby platforms to develop the ability to detect deepfake content and to clearly label it. He proposes a universal standard of a watermark on every frame of the video, similar to the practice of Hey Gen, in order to clearly indicate that the content is generated by artificial intelligence. Jose mentions the channel 'Glas pape' which states in the description that the content is AI generated, but Matthew considers that this is not enough and that a more visible watermark is needed.

sections.subtitle: Pravna zaštita osobnog lika i glasa u eri AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava potrebu za pravnom zaštitom osobnog lika i glasa od zlouporabe AI.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi postavlja pitanje pravnih granica, posebno kada se AI generirani sadržaj kategorizira kao 'zabava', čime se izbjegavaju stroži standardi za 'vijesti'. Matthew ističe da bi pojedinci trebali imati zakonska prava na vlastitu sliku i glas, slično autorskim pravima. Smatra da bi neovlašteno korištenje nečijeg lika ili glasa trebalo biti podložno tužbi. Iako su pravni presedani u ovom području rijetki i složeni, Matthew vjeruje da će zakonodavci imati široku podršku građana za donošenje zakona koji štite osobni suverenitet u digitalnom prostoru. Predlaže da se počne s zaštitom osobnosti, a zatim se razmotre složenija pitanja dezinformacija koje ne uključuju izravnu zlouporabu lika ili glasa.
sections.subtitle_en: Legal protection of personal likeness and voice in the era of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the need for legal protection of personal image and voice from AI misuse.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi poses the question of legal boundaries, especially when AI-generated content is categorized as 'entertainment', by which stricter standards for 'news' are avoided. Matthew emphasizes that individuals should have legal rights to their own image and voice, similar to copyrights. He considers that the unauthorized use of someone's likeness or voice should be subject to a lawsuit. Although legal precedents in this area are rare and complex, Matthew believes that legislators will have broad support from citizens for passing laws that protect personal sovereignty in the digital space. He proposes starting with the protection of personality, and then considering more complex issues of disinformation that do not include direct abuse of likeness or voice.

sections.subtitle: Potencijalno vodstvo Vatikana u regulaciji AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o ulozi Vatikana kao 'meke sile' u regulaciji AI.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi izražava uvjerenje da će Vatikan, kao institucija, igrati ključnu ulogu u poticanju regulacije AI, posebno u pogledu zaštite lika i glasa Pape. Matthew se nadovezuje, ističući da Crkva ima jedinstvenu priliku zagovarati nešto što je važno za svakoga na svijetu. Smatra da je Papa 'najveća meka sila' i 'najutjecajniji morfik na svijetu', te da se nijedna tvrtka neće htjeti boriti protiv njega po ovom pitanju. Matthew vjeruje da će, ako Vatikan jasno poruči da se zlouporaba AI mora zaustaviti, to stvoriti presedan koji se može primijeniti na sve, potičući suradnju među tvrtkama na razvoju protokola za označavanje i regulaciju AI sadržaja.
sections.subtitle_en: Potential Vatican leadership in AI regulation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the role of the Vatican as 'soft power' in the regulation of AI.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi expresses the belief that the Vatican, as an institution, will play a key role in encouraging AI regulation, especially regarding the protection of the image and voice of the Pope. Matthew adds, emphasizing that the Church has a unique opportunity to advocate for something that is important for everyone in the world. He considers that the Pope is 'the greatest soft power' and 'the most influential morphic in the world', and that no company will want to fight against him on this issue. Matthew believes that if the Vatican clearly messages that the abuse of AI must be stopped, this will create a precedent that can be applied to everyone, encouraging cooperation among companies on the development of protocols for labeling and regulation of AI content.

sections.subtitle: Uloga lokalnih crkvenih vođa u odnosu s katoličkim influencerima
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj pita Josea o odnosu lokalnih biskupa i katoličkih influencera.
sections.content: Voditelj pita Josea Diorikidija o odnosu između lokalnih biskupija, biskupa i svećenika s katoličkim influencerima. Ističe da influenceri, često s milijunima pratitelja, imaju nesrazmjerno velik utjecaj na razgovor i mogu usmjeriti pažnju na kritične teme, što može imati i pozitivan i negativan učinak. Voditelj želi znati kako se taj odnos mijenja i kako lokalni crkveni vođe mogu izgraditi konstruktivne odnose s tim utjecajnim osobama.
sections.subtitle_en: The role of local church leaders in relationship with Catholic influencers
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host asks Jose about the relationship between local bishops and Catholic influencers.
sections.content_en: The host asks Jose Diorikidi about the relationship between local dioceses, bishops, and priests with Catholic influencers. He points out that influencers, often with millions of followers, have a disproportionately large influence on the conversation and can direct attention to critical topics, which can have both a positive and a negative effect. The host wants to know how that relationship is changing and how local church leaders can build constructive relationships with those influential persons.

sections.subtitle: Internet kao 'nova misionarska granica': Formacija i pratnja digitalnih misionara
sections.screenshot_description: Jose Diorikidi objašnjava koncept interneta kao nove misionarske granice i potrebu za formacijom digitalnih misionara.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi objašnjava da Crkva, posebno Vatikan, sve više prepoznaje internet kao 'novu misionarsku granicu', 'novu Europu' ili 'digitalni kontinent', kako je to formulirao papa Benedikt 2009. godine. To je mjesto gdje ljudi provode vrijeme, traže svrhu, ljubav, istinu i Boga, često nesvjesno. Jose povlači paralelu s tradicionalnim misijama: kao što su misionari bili formirani, pratili su ih i podržavali, tako se mora postupati i s digitalnim misionarima. Naglašava da je internet kultura sa svojim jezikom i običajima, a digitalni misionari su poput onih koji su nekada odlazili u nove zemlje – moraju naučiti jezik, svjedočiti i voditi ljude Kristu. Crkva sada prepoznaje te laike, svećenike i redovnike kao misionare koji donose Evanđelje do 'kraja svijeta' putem digitalnih platformi. Jose ističe da je formacija, pratnja i podrška ključna, unatoč rizicima koje digitalni svijet nosi.
sections.subtitle_en: Internet as a 'new missionary frontier': Formation and accompaniment of digital missionaries
sections.screenshot_description_en: Jose Diorikidi explains the concept of the internet as a new missionary frontier and the need for the formation of digital missionaries.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi explains that the Church, especially the Vatican, increasingly recognizes the internet as a 'new missionary frontier', 'new Europe' or 'digital continent', as Pope Benedict formulated it in 2009. It is a place where people spend time, seek purpose, love, truth and God, often unconsciously. Jose draws a parallel with traditional missions: just as missionaries were formed, accompanied and supported, so must digital missionaries be treated. He emphasizes that the internet is a culture with its own language and customs, and digital missionaries are like those who once went to new lands – they must learn the language, witness and lead people to Christ. The Church now recognizes these laypeople, priests and religious as missionaries who bring the Gospel to the 'ends of the earth' via digital platforms. Jose emphasizes that formation, accompaniment and support are key, despite the risks that the digital world carries.

sections.subtitle: Angažman biskupija s digitalnim kreatorima: Pilot programi i strukture podrške
sections.screenshot_description: Jose Diorikidi govori o pilot programima biskupija za podršku digitalnim kreatorima.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi opisuje kako se koncept digitalne misije sada spušta na razinu biskupskih konferencija i biskupija. Diljem svijeta pokreću se pilot programi u kojima se biskupi sastaju s lokalnim katoličkim kreatorima. Cilj je upoznati ih, razumjeti njihove motive i pratiti ih u njihovom radu. To uključuje osiguravanje da njihov sadržaj bude u skladu s crkvenim naukom i načelima ljubavi, te da se radi na jedinstvu. Jose navodi da se u nekim biskupijama osnivaju novi uredi za digitalno ministarstvo, bilo pod odjelom za evangelizaciju ili komunikacije. Ključno je da biskupi i pastiri prepoznaju te kreatore kao misionare i prate ih u njihovom nastojanju da ljude dovedu u Crkvu, a ne samo da skupljaju 'lajkove' ili preglede.
sections.subtitle_en: Engagement of dioceses with digital creators: Pilot programs and support structures
sections.screenshot_description_en: Jose Diorikidi speaks about pilot programs of dioceses for support to digital creators.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi describes how the concept of digital mission is now descending to the level of episcopal conferences and dioceses. Throughout the world, pilot programs are being launched in which bishops meet with local Catholic creators. The goal is to get to know them, understand their motives, and accompany them in their work. This includes ensuring that their content is in accordance with Church teaching and principles of love, and that work is done on unity. Jose states that in some dioceses, new offices for digital ministry are being established, either under the department for evangelization or communications. It is crucial that bishops and pastors recognize these creators as missionaries and accompany them in their effort to bring people into the Church, and not just to collect 'likes' or views.

sections.subtitle: Preusmjeravanje online obraćenika u lokalne župne zajednice
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava izazov preusmjeravanja online obraćenika u župne zajednice.
sections.content: Matthew se osvrće na izazov 'odstupanja' – kako online obraćenike, koji su intelektualno preobraženi putem digitalnih platformi poput Magisterium AI ili Hello aplikacije, preusmjeriti u lokalne župne zajednice. Ističe da je to ključno područje gdje je potrebno razviti učinkovite kanale. Postavlja pitanje treba li ih slati izravno u župe ili na neku vrstu 'srednje platforme' koja pomaže u pronalaženju zajednice, ili oboje. Matthew naglašava da laici moraju preuzeti vodstvo u rješavanju ovog problema, jer su pastiri preopterećeni i često nemaju stručnost u tehnologiji i novim medijima. Potrebno je pokretati pilot projekte i pokazati učinkovitost takvih inicijativa, prepoznajući da Bog poziva i laike na služenje i propovijedanje Evanđelja.
sections.subtitle_en: Redirecting online converts into local parish communities
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the challenge of redirecting online converts into parish communities.
sections.content_en: Matthew reflects on the challenge of 'off-ramping' – how to redirect online converts, who are intellectually transformed through digital platforms like Magisterium AI or the Hello application, into local parish communities. He emphasizes that this is a key area where it is necessary to develop effective channels. He poses the question of whether they should be sent directly to parishes or to some kind of 'middle platform' that helps in finding a community, or both. Matthew emphasizes that the laity must take the lead in solving this problem, because pastors are overburdened and often do not have expertise in technology and new media. It is necessary to launch pilot projects and show the effectiveness of such initiatives, recognizing that God also calls the laity to service and preaching the Gospel.

sections.subtitle: Pastoralno vodstvo naspram inkvizicije: Poticanje laičkih misionarskih zvanja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o potrebi za pastoralnim vodstvom umjesto 'inkvizicije' u Crkvi.
sections.content: Matthew kritizira tendenciju nekih nadbiskupija da djeluju kao 'inkvizicija', fokusirajući se na zabrane i ograničenja, umjesto da budu pravi pastiri. Naglašava da uloga pastira ide mnogo dalje od administrativnih zadataka i da se mora temeljiti na brizi i ljubavi prema ovcama. Matthew ističe da je ključno njegovati laička misionarska zvanja, prepoznajući da Bog poziva pojedince da služe i evangeliziraju. Ako svećenici i biskupi pristupe laicima s ljubavlju i podrškom, prepoznajući njihov poziv, to će stvoriti duboke i smislene odnose. Takav pristup omogućuje laicima da budu učinkovitiji u dosezanju ljudi, što u konačnici znači 'više duša za Krista'. Matthew zaključuje da je potrebno da se biskupi i svećenici okupe i podrže ovu posebnu akciju.
sections.subtitle_en: Pastoral leadership versus the Inquisition: Fostering lay missionary vocations
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the need for pastoral leadership instead of 'inquisition' in the Church.
sections.content_en: Matthew criticizes the tendency of some archdioceses to act as an 'inquisition', focusing on prohibitions and restrictions, instead of being true shepherds. He emphasizes that the role of a shepherd goes much further than administrative tasks and that it must be based on care and love for the sheep. Matthew points out that it is crucial to nurture lay missionary vocations, recognizing that God calls individuals to serve and evangelize. If priests and bishops approach the laity with love and support, recognizing their calling, this will create deep and meaningful relationships. Such an approach enables the laity to be more effective in reaching people, which ultimately means 'more souls for Christ'. Matthew concludes that it is necessary for bishops and priests to gather and support this special action.

sections.subtitle: Glavni zaključak iz Rima: Validacija i obnovljeni misionarski poticaj
sections.screenshot_description: Jose Diorikidi dijeli svoje ključne zaključke s događaja u Rimu, ističući osjećaj validacije za digitalne misionare.
sections.content: Jose Diorikidi dijeli svoje ključne zaključke s nedavnog boravka u Rimu, gdje je sudjelovao na događaju za digitalne misionare u sklopu Jubileja. Ističe da je najvažnije otkriće osjećaj validacije i spoznaja da digitalni kreatori nisu sami. Susret s drugim influencerima iz cijelog svijeta, kao i prisutnost visokih crkvenih dužnosnika poput državnog tajnika, prefekta Dikasterija za evangelizaciju i prefekta Dikasterija za komunikacije, bio je transformativan. Činjenica da ih je Papa nazvao 'digitalnim misionarima' i da su službeno 'poslani' da evangeliziraju online, donijela je obnovljeni misionarski poticaj. Jose naglašava da se sada osjeća osnaženim da se vrati u Dallas i izravno surađuje sa svojim biskupom i dijecezom na evangelizacijskim inicijativama, prepoznajući da je to rizično, ali nužno. To nije 'odobrenje' za bilo što, već potvrda da su misionari koje Crkva prati.
sections.subtitle_en: Main conclusion from Rim: Validation and renewed missionary impulse
sections.screenshot_description_en: Jose Diorikidi shares his key conclusions from the event in Rim, highlighting a sense of validation for digital missionaries.
sections.content_en: Jose Diorikidi shares his key conclusions from a recent stay in Rome, where he participated in an event for digital missionaries as part of the Jubilee. He emphasizes that the most important discovery is a sense of validation and the realization that digital creators are not alone. The meeting with other influencers from all over the world, as well as the presence of high church officials such as the Secretary of State, the Prefect of the Dicastery for Evangelization, and the Prefect of the Dicastery for Communication, was transformative. The fact that the Pope called them 'digital missionaries' and that they were officially 'sent' to evangelize online, brought a renewed missionary impulse. Jose emphasizes that he now feels empowered to return to Dallas and directly collaborate with his bishop and diocese on evangelization initiatives, recognizing that it is risky but necessary. This is not 'approval' for anything, but a confirmation that they are missionaries whom the Church accompanies.

iterations.theme_en: The influence of artificial intelligence on Catholic evangelization: Opportunities, challenges of deepfake, and the role of the Church in supporting digital missionaries
